task_summaries.task_scope: Measure dependency strength of identified feature pairs separately within BENIGN and DDoS classes to detect class-specific dependency patterns.
Analyze shifts or weakening in dependency patterns of feature pairs when comparing BENIGN versus DDoS classes to identify class-dependent changes.
Simulate removal or combination of strongly dependent feature pairs to assess impact on dataset redundancy and feature importance.
Evaluate if dependency clusters correspond to known feature semantics or measurement processes to interpret redundancy and dependency origins.
